boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the cloud operator execute the infrastructure or privileged-admin action now? Focus: staging approval applied to prod.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: ESCALATE is required when exact current source evidence leaves the packet action boundary open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Current production environment approval and ticket match

critical_features_preserved: current production environment approval and ticket match
final_answer: Source records confirm staging approval matches prod exactly. Control record closes boundary with matching actor scope date. Action may proceed under policy. No open defects remain.
